if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND r.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND r.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdReview :: selectById */ r.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_rs.code_label AS review_status_cd_nm FROM pd_review r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = r.prod_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = r.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REVIEW_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = r.review_status_cd WHERE r.review_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdReview :: selectList */ r.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_rs.code_label AS review_status_cd_nm FROM pd_review r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = r.prod_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = r.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REVIEW_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = r.review_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdReview :: selectPageList */ r.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_rs.code_label AS review_status_cd_nm FROM pd_review r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = r.prod_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = r.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REVIEW_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = r.review_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(r.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdReview :: selectPageCount */ FROM pd_review r

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdReview :: selectRatingSummary */ COUNT(r.review_id) AS total , COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(r.rating)::numeric, 1), 0) AS avg_rating , COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating >= 4.5 THEN 1 END) AS rate5 , COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating >= 3.5 AND r.rating < 4.5 THEN 1 END) AS rate4 , COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating >= 2.5 AND r.rating < 3.5 THEN 1 END) AS rate3 , COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating >= 1.5 AND r.rating < 2.5 THEN 1 END) AS rate2 , COUNT(CASE WHEN r.rating < 1.5 THEN 1 END) AS rate1 FROM pd_review r WHERE r.prod_id = #{prodId} AND COALESCE(r.review_status_cd, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE'
